overall.description: A first-person perspective ride on the NCART metro system in Night City from Cyberpunk 2077. The clip begins at Memorial Park station platform, transitions through a dark tunnel, and emerges to show a sweeping elevated view of the futuristic neon-lit cityscape with skyscrapers, highways, and flying vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic metro station platform with neon signage

events.description: train doors close and scene transitions to dark train interior

agents.ego_description: standing on the Memorial Park station platform waiting to board the train

notable_agents.action: standing near the platform edge facing the tracks
sitting on a bench against the wall

entered.detail: large illuminated yellow neon sign reading MEMORIAL PARK mounted on the station wall
digital billboard displaying animated advertisement with red and yellow graphics
futuristic concrete bench integrated into the station architecture
curved concrete walls with horizontal neon light strips and industrial piping

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on the Memorial Park metro station platform, an indoor cyberpunk transit hub with curved concrete architecture and prominent yellow neon signage. Several NPCs wait scattered across the platform—one standing near the edge and another sitting on a bench—while digital advertisements glow on the far wall. The lighting is entirely artificial, creating a moody, enclosed atmosphere typical of Night City's underground transit system.

scene_state.functional_zone: train interior moving through dark underground tunnel

events.description: enters the NCART train and moves into a dark tunnel
red emergency lights illuminate the dark concrete tunnel walls

agents.ego_description: riding inside the NCART train through a dark underground tunnel

entered.detail: rough concrete tunnel walls passing by in darkness
red emergency lighting strips on the train ceiling reflecting off windows

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to the interior of a moving train car, now traveling through a pitch-black underground tunnel. The only illumination comes from red emergency lights inside the train, casting an eerie glow on the concrete walls sliding past the windows. The NCART automated announcements indicate the next stops as the train accelerates through the enclosed corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train track passing through dense urban canyon between skyscrapers

events.description: train exits the tunnel into open air between tall city buildings
train rounds a slight curve, revealing more of the industrial building facades

agents.ego_description: riding the elevated train through the urban canyon, observing close-up views of building facades and street level below

entered.detail: vertical illuminated advertisement for MIX IT UP beverage in purple and white
rusted metal support beams and industrial scaffolding on building exterior
large painted flag mural on the side of a concrete industrial building
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting two buildings across the tracks

segments.scene_description: The train bursts from the tunnel into the open air of Night City's urban canyon, now elevated above the streets. The camera moves past close-quarters skyscrapers featuring industrial girders, large advertisements, and a prominent Puerto Rican flag mural. Mixed lighting from street level and building windows illuminates the scene as the train passes under an overhead walkway, with sparse traffic visible on the roads below.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train track with panoramic views of futuristic downtown skyline and highway interchange

events.description: train emerges from urban canyon to elevated section revealing wide cityscape views
view opens up to show extensive cityscape with DTR tower and multiple highways

agents.ego_description: riding the train at high elevation, observing the sprawling Night City skyline with neon advertisements, highway traffic, and flying vehicles

notable_agents.action: flying car passing between buildings in the distance

entered.detail: tall skyscraper with large illuminated DTR logo in blue and red neon
multi-level highway system with streams of vehicle headlights and taillights
skyscraper with illuminated 06 signage near the top
skyscraper with illuminated 07 signage near the top

segments.scene_description: The train reaches the highest elevation, revealing a breathtaking panoramic view of Night City's sprawling downtown. The DTR tower dominates the right side with its massive neon signage, while corporate towers numbered 06 and 07 rise in the distance. Below, the highway interchange teems with moderate traffic, and a flying vehicle cruises between buildings. The wide-open skyline stretches into the hazy night, showcasing the full scale of the cyberpunk metropolis.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the enclosed, artificial depths of a metro station into a sweeping, elevated panorama of a neon-lit metropolis. It begins on the Memorial Park platform, where curved concrete and yellow neon signage create a moody, indoor atmosphere among waiting passengers. The perspective then shifts into a moving train car that plunges into a pitch-black tunnel, with the environment narrowing to the eerie red glow of emergency lights reflecting off sliding concrete walls. As the train bursts from the tunnel into the open air, the scene expands into an urban canyon of industrial girders and vibrant murals before gliding under an overhead walkway. Finally, the camera reaches its highest elevation to reveal the sprawling downtown skyline, dominated by the massive DTR tower and corporate skyscrapers overlooking a bustling highway and flying vehicles.
